name: Osun State (Nigeria)

colors.symbolism: the soil and the cocoa fields for which Osun State is known
the gold of Yoruba heritage and the lower stripes

description: A large brown field over a series of vertical stripes in red, green, and yellow at the lower fly.
history: Osun State was created on 27 August 1991 when it was carved out of the former Oyo State. The state lies in the Yoruba heartland of southwestern Nigeria; the flag's colours and motifs draw on the agricultural and cultural heritage of the region.
